markdown:
Let's share
a moment
WELCOME TO DRUGSTORE

Because that's what life is all about. Sharing moments with others.
And knowing how to cherish them and make them even more
special. Here, you can do just that. For nearly 50 years now. With a menu
tailored to every time of day. So that not a single moment
is wasted. Welcome to Drugstore.

So yes, we’ve been around for a while. Spanning
two generations of our family. Recently, we’ve launched
a completely revamped concept. Our
two buildings underwent a total
makeover. Just like the Grote Markt,
more than ever the beating heart of our
beautiful city. And our
faithful companion all these years. Drugstore is deeply rooted
in this spot. Where everything revolves around
coming together. Our summer and winter terraces are
oases of calm for visitors and a little
like coming home for every Hasselaar.

Come explore our shop. Take in
the atmosphere and immediately the aroma of
our Mibrasa and pizza oven. The best
of both worlds. North and south. They
reveal what the new Drugsstore stands
for: natural aromas, unique flavors,
food sharing, and a varied and creative
selection. Without losing sight of the classics

. Visit our stylish wine fridge
and make your own selection for lunch or
dinner. Or for an aperitif by the starry
fireplace.

Every corner of our establishment tells a
story. Like the neon lighting that
evokes the iconic facade of
yesteryear and the elongated bar that seamlessly
connects the two
former buildings. Like one big family. This is where
your moments shine brightest.
You’ll feel right at home here. And you’re
always welcome. From dawn until
dusk. Starting in 2023, even
through the night. Browse our menu and let yourself
be surprised. Choose your moment and make it
unforgettable.

Enjoy!

The
Byloos Family

* * *

GRAND CAFE
DRUGSTORE
EST 1974

your day
is as nice as

bright morning moments

7:30 AM - 11:00 AM bright
morning
moments
7:30 AM - 11:00 AM

@Phillipe van Golven - UAU

Cheerfully early or leisurely late.
The best days start with a good
breakfast. We’d love to treat you to a
delicious, healthy breakfast. And you’ll be
all set for a productive workday or a
day of fun shopping and leisurely strolling
through Hasselt’s shopping streets.

Our fresh-off-the-press breakfast menus offer something
for everyone. Surprisingly healthy or
hearty and traditional, but always delicious.
For a cozy and cheerful start.
Sunny side up!

Give someone else a good
morning mood with our Drugstore
Breakfast for two.

More info at [www.drugstorehasselt.be](http://www.drugstorehasselt.be/)

One bill per table,
maximum 4 dishes per table.

wonderful midday
moments
10:00 AM - 5:00 PM

A quick lunch or perhaps a quiet moment for that much-needed
break in your day. Both are perfectly possible. The best break is
one where you enjoy yourself and take your time. For yourself or your company.

Choose from our extensive selection. A light menu featuring
well-known classics with a refreshing twist and creative dishesin accessible styles. Hasselt is and remains a gem. At any
time of day, we’re ready with a smile to
pamper you.

Want to surprise your family, friends, or colleagues with a tasty
break-the-day-up lunch voucher?
That’s easy with the Drugstore Gift Card.

Reserve your gift card at
[www.drugstorehasselt.be](http://www.drugstorehasselt.be/)
or ask our waitstaff for one.

* * *

20
cosy
appetizing
moments

Fancy some? In a little this and a little that.
In a glass and a bite. In a
relaxing chat after a tough
workday. In a cozy chat just
before dinner. In short: a moment when
you can share everything with the people you
care about. Even the contents of your plate.

That’s what we call aperitif time. Drugstore is
the perfect spot for after-work drinks with
colleagues or a pre-dinner get-together with family and
friends. With our southern-style tapas plates
and tasty appetizers, the conversation
really gets going. Just pick something and then enjoy
sharing it.

Shared joy is double joy.
Make someone happy with a Drugstore
Aperobon for a house aperitif
with sharing dishes.

“Sharing
is caring.”

We time!
Something to celebrate?
Use our popular venue for
your event. An authentic setting in
the historic heart of Hasselt.
Here, special moments
become extraordinary. And memories are made.

Create an enlightening moment with
your association or colleagues. Our small room
on the first floor is a perfect
breeding ground for fresh ideas and
discreet discussions with a beautiful view
of the Grote Markt. There is room for
up to 30 people.

Vino time
by Maarten Hofenk

Wine expert Maarten Hofenk has selected,
based on his deep passion for wine,
a unique assortment of wines for
Drugstore. A good glass of wine is simply
synonymous with experience, enjoyment, and pleasure.
Discover the extensive wine list and let our
sommeliers advise you. Do you prefer to
choose your own bottles based on the beautiful
label or the original bottle shape?
Our wine display case showcasing the extensive
selection is definitely worth a look.

* * *

White wine recommendations by Maarten Hofenk

California Roots 'Chardonnay'
Fresh, fruity
The best ingredients for a good life are simple: good food, good friends, and above all, good wine. This Chardonnay from California has a pale yellow, clear color.
On the nose, we find aromas of white stone fruit (peach, nectarine, etc.) and blossoms.
The taste is smooth, light, and elegant.
A versatile and affordable Chardonnay with plenty of charm!

Le Pas du Moine Château Gassier 'Rolle / Ugni Blanc'
Terroir-driven, mineral
A top white wine from the Gassier estate, with a history spanning five generations. Château Gassier is located in the heart of the Arc Valley, east of Aix-Provence. A very delicious, fresh white wine from the Côtes de Provence. Delightful nose of lychee and mango with a subtle hint of flowers and exotic fruit. A beautiful combination of complexity and a long finish.
A major surprise!

Winkl Cantina Tertan 'Sauvignon Blanc'
Terroir, mineral
Cantina Tertano, founded in 1893, has a long tradition of producing white wines. The high-altitude subregion of Winkl is the source of superior Sauvignon grapes. This 100% Sauvignon Blanc cuvée can easily be compared to the very best Sancerre and Pouilly-Fumé wines. A delightful Sauvignon Blanc with typical aromas of white fruit and passion fruit. A hint of lychee and citrus. Highly recommended for true Sauvignon Blanc enthusiasts!

La Rocca Pieropan 'Garganega'
Full-Bodied
The success formula of Leonildo Pieropan and his two sons, Andrea and Dario, consists of three ingredients: respect for the vineyard, passion for local culture, and the preservation of family traditions. The pure expression of Garganega can be found in the top-tier La Rocca, named after the medieval castle that towers high above Soave. This wine is the only one of the white wines to age for 12 months in large wooden barrels. La Rocca is deep, lemon-yellow, and immediately offers an expressive bouquet full of ripe fruit [pear, peach]] and a hint of wood. The rich flavor is highly complex, with fruit, minerality, and acidity blending perfectly.
Top Soave!

Vie di Romans 'Chardonnay'
Full-Bodied
Azienda Agricola Vie di Romans is located in the village of Mariano del Friuli and is considered one of Friuli’s absolute top producers. Here, the grapes are harvested at the optimal moment and immediately transferred to one of the region’s finest cellars. The optimal ripeness, Giantranca Gallo’s vinification methods, and the long aging on the lees ensure that his wines rank among the absolute best in the world. The quality of the wines is internationally recognized. Light golden-yellow color. Subtle, elegant nose ofchamomile flowers, acacia, and hints of honeysuckle. This wine has a light, spicy body with a touch of fine oak. A great Chardonnay, just as you’d expect.

“Let’s drink”
“ad Bibendum” can be loosely translated as
‘Let’s drink’. But not just
any old wine

Since 1997, Johan & Bjorn
Monard have been searching worldwide for wines with
character, excitement, and emotion.
Curiosity, expertise, and passion
drive them. And you benefit from that. They have a
selection of no fewer than 1,200 wines
from 16 different countries: Latin America,
Australia, New Zealand, South Africa, the USA,
and, of course, top wines from the great
European wineries.
We wish you many discoveries and
enjoyable tastings. Quality brings us together.
For years, brothers Johan
& Bjorn Monard have been working successfully with the
Bylsoos family. In a beautiful setting, with a
delicious meal, a wonderful glass of wine is a must.

[www.adbibendum.net](http://www.adbibendum.net/)

Red wine recommendations by Maarten Hofenk

Pietranera Piaggia 'Sangiovese'
Complex
The Piaggia estate is located in Poggio a Cairoo, about 14 kilometers west of Florence. Mauro Vanucci settled there in the 1970s and purchased 15 hectares of vineyards in the Carmignano appellation, where he has managed to extract the highest possible quality. The Pietranera has an intense ruby-red color. A complex nose with notes of forest fruits and soft herbs. A full-bodied and beautifully balanced palate with a good tension between tannins and acidity. Paired with a long finish and a touch of freshness.

Substance 'By Charles Smith' Wines of Substance 'Cabernet Sauvignon'
A blend of Cabernet Sauvignon from Goose Ridge & Frenchman Hills in the Columbia Valley. The combination of the two terroirs gives the wine a unique signature. The Frenchman Hills vineyard is located in one of the warmest regions but remains relatively cool, partly due to its elevation of 500 meters. Rich notes of blackcurrant,but also tobacco and morel. The distinct minerality is interwoven into a rich bouquet. A superb Cabernet with a sought-after bouquet—unique!

Blaufränkisch Moric 'Blaufränkisch'
Complex
While brother Hainz at the family estate Velich turns heads with his magnificent Chardonnays and sweet wines, Roland Velich, on the other side of the Mittlmer in Burgentand, focuses on top-quality reds. Previously unseen and truly unique is the Moricwines, all single-vineyard wines based on the typical Blaufränkisch. Velich crafts his Blaufränkisch like a winemaker in Burgundy does with his Pinot Noir. It is therefore not surprising that these great wines bear Pinot Noir characteristics. Deep color with violet hues at the rim. Aromaof rich cherry and strawberry. A knotty, juicy red cherry on the palate, complemented by leather notes. Elegant power without being harsh, and good aging potential.

Peiragal Marchesi di Barolo 'Barbera d'Alba'
Complex
It seemed like a stroke of genius at Marchesi di Barolo when they cleared a vineyard in the heart of Barolo to plant Barbera. After all, Barolo is unique and very expensive, and as a result, the Nebbiolo-driven wines of Barolo are revered. But with this red Barbera, Marchesi di Barolo wanted to prove that the soil and terroir are unique, and that they can create a unique wine here with this variety. A warm, robust, full-bodied, and enjoyable wine. Ruby-red, with an almost purple hue. In the wine’s aroma, you’ll detect notes of berries, currants, toasted hazelnut, and vanilla. The palate is round, refined, and balanced with plenty of black and red fruit, as well as light spices, vanilla, oak, licorice, and toasted notes. What a fantastic wine!

Aalto 'Tinto Fino'
Complex
Aalto is one of Spain’s most sought-after wines. The magnificent winery was founded in 1999. Mariano Garcia, the man who made Vega Sicilia great back then, is deeply involved in the vision and philosophy of this prestigious winery. To this day, it is still Garcia who determines the vinification and style of the wine. In less than 15 years, the magnificent Aalto has established itself among the absolute top of Spain. The wines are characterized by elegant power and aging grace. A complex blend of blackcurrants, toast, mocha, and earthy notes. The palate is distinctive and full of dark red fruit. With its magnificent balance, this is a superbly distinguished, noble wine for the connoisseur.

GINS

How the successful hospitality family “Byloos” connects with
suppliers from their own city and thrives as a result. Both the Fryns
Distillery and Drugstore have been anchored in
Hasselt’s cityscape throughout history.
And where better for locals to connect than in the
heart of Hasselt’s city center, the Grote Markt.
Fryns, inextricably linked to Hasselt since 1887,
guarantees sustainability, authenticity, and craftsmanship,

“Maes Coffee, a
matter of good
taste”

Maes Coffee is a family business. Since
its establishment in Hasselt in 1958, the
specialty shop has grown to become the pride of
Limburg. Widely appreciated, Maes Coffee
is officially recognized as a regional product, “coffee from
the Land of Loon.”
Maes Coffee guarantees top quality
through its strict selection and supervision during
the purchase of green coffee and the
artisanal roasting method by its
own master roasters.
Maes Coffee has a retail location at
Maastrichterstraat 8
in Hasselt.

“P&G Metaalwerken: a powerful combination of design and quality!”

Want to fully enjoy your patio and garden? Of course, you can do that in the summer, but when you talk to the team at P&G Metaalwerken, you realize that it’s actually possible any time of the year. Whether you’re just relaxing or having a bite to eat with friends, there are plenty of possibilities, and it makes your life a whole lot more enjoyable. There is one condition, though: you need to have this done by true specialists. And that’s where P&G Metaalwerken comes in!

metalwork

ORYESPORT

“60 years of expertise in interior design projects,
now available to private clients!”

60 years of expertise in interior design projects, now available to private clients.
Over the past fifty years, Schevenels Project Interiors has developed
into one of the market leaders in interior construction in Belgium.
In addition to creating custom-made furniture, we also
the design and management of large, complex turnkey projects.

Every day, we carry out projects for renowned
interior architects, international hotel chains, well-known retailers,
large healthcare institutions, as well as interior renovations in your home,
turnkey projects for retail stores and hospitality establishments. Specifically in
Hasselt, we’ve had the honor of furnishing numerous other
renowned businesses in addition to the Drugstore.

enjoy outdoor moments

Enjoy every moment on the terrace: at the Drugstore, you can. In the summer under the shady canopy of the tree, in the fall under the covered and heated terrace. During the winter months in true après-ski style in the Christmas cabin, in the spring behind glass as the first rays of sunshine caress you.

“At Pure Air, you’ll find what you need!”

Our consultants, engineers, and estimators ensure a custom-made installation that meets all your needs.
